sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, nullable_col Nullable(Int32), str_col String, date_col Date, num_col Float64);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, NULL, 'example', '2023-01-01', 3.14), (2, 2, 'test', '2023-02-01', 1.59), (3, NULL, NULL, NULL, 2.72);
SELECT id, isNull(nullable_col) AS is_null_check FROM test_table WHERE isNull(str_col) AND (date_col < '2023-03-01') AND (num_col > 2.0 OR isNull(nullable_col));
CREATE TABLE other_table (id Int32, join_key Int32);
SELECT a.id, b.id FROM test_table AS a JOIN other_table AS b ON a.id = b.join_key OR isNull(b.join_key);
SELECT id, count(*), isNull(nullable_col) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING isNull(nullable_col) AND count(*) > 0;
SELECT id, sum(num_col) OVER (PARTITION BY isNull(nullable_col)) AS col_sum FROM test_table;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE (nullable_col IS NULL AND str_col != '') AND (SELECT count(*) FROM other_table WHERE join_key = test_table.id AND isNull(join_key));
SELECT id, CASE WHEN isNull(num_col) THEN 'No Value' ELSE toString(num_col) END AS num_status FROM test_table WHERE str_col NOT IN (SELECT str_col FROM test_table WHERE isNull(str_col));
